Discover how to securely tap into your content’s potential. See how Box transforms the way enterprises work with AI.
Watch sessions on demand
News
Pricing
Contact
Log in
Get started
Content
+ AI
Intelligent
content management, secure collaboration, and agentic workflow
White arrow right
Get started
Contact us
Trusted by the world’s leading organizations.
See customers
Collaborate easily and securely
Sales presentations, product specs, employee handbooks: Unstructured data is at the center of how you work. Access, share, edit, and co-create content with AI while accelerating productivity. Enterprise-grade
security and compliance
ensure sensitive data stays protected as teams work together from anywhere, inside or outside your organization.
Explore collaboration
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch video
Get AI insights from content
Harness the value of unstructured data like lease agreements and finance documents, and get instant insights from
any amount of content
across your enterprise. Box AI lets you seamlessly tap into leading AI models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google for real-time summaries, deep analysis, and smart recommendations.
See AI in action
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch video
Extract critical data at scale
Identify and retrieve structured data from your content — from detailed contracts to bank statements and handwritten bills of lading. Automate document processing with customized extraction agents for higher accuracy and confidence.
Power extraction
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch video
Automate with AI agents
Effortlessly design and deploy complex workflows with an intuitive drag-and-drop builder, and automate key tasks with agents. From loan processing to onboarding employees and vendors, accelerate end-to-end business processes with AI.
Automate workflows
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch video
Protect all your content
Safeguard sensitive data with AI-driven security that detects and mitigates threats in real time. Get deep learning-based malware detection and timely alerts about unusual activity, plus automated classification and granular access controls that protect your data at scale. Meet requirements like GDPR, HIPAA, and FINRA with built-in compliance tools.
Explore tools
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch video
Build with AI-native APIs
Our Intelligent Content Management platform provides seamless collaboration, content security, and AI capabilities that empower developers to build, customize, and integrate across their apps. Deliver AI-powered insights, along with exceptional user and agentic experiences, and customize agents to streamline workflows with Box AI Studio.
Build with APIs
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch webinar
Power seamless e-signatures
Close deals and onboard talent faster. With a solution that’s built right where your content lives, you can stop jumping from emails to e-signature apps. AI-driven e-signature workflows let you sign, approve, and track documents directly within your content ecosystem. Automate requests and follow-ups, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks. Best of all, get unlimited e-signatures for free to streamline work without added costs.
Streamline signing
Icon Play Blue 20x20
Watch video
One secure,
intelligent
platform with 1,500+ app integrations
White arrow right
See all integrations
Named a Leader by independent analyst firms
Discover why Box was named a Leader based on our “Ability to Execute” and “Completeness of Vision.”
Read now
Explore why Box was named a Leader, with the highest scores possible in 13 criteria such as innovation, vision, security, AI/ML (including generative AI), and more.
Read now
See why Box was named a Leader, with recognition for AI/ML, integration and interoperability, and security.
Read now
By investing in a cloud content management platform like Box and leveraging other best-of-breed technology partners, we have been able to create a more secure, efficient, and collaborative environment for conducting business.
– CDO, Morgan Stanley Wealth Management
Icon Paper white
Read story
Icon File Document
More customer stories
Box fits the ‘3S-3C’ model: Simplicity, scalability, and security. Cloud-based, clean desks, and current.
– Vice President and CIO, Broadcom
Icon Paper white
Read story
Icon File Document
More customer stories

integrations.text:
Box Integrations | Connect Intelligent Content Across 1,500+ Apps Securely
We’re named a Leader in the 2026® Gartner Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management.
Read report
Content + AI Virtual Summit sessions are on demand. Learn how to get more value from your unstructured data.
Watch now
Your business lives in content - unleash it with the new Box Agent.
Learn more
Box Automate is here: Put content and AI to work. Power every business workflow.

Box Docs
Virtual Summit 2026
Discover how to securely tap into your content’s potential. See how Box transforms the way enterprises work with AI.
Watch sessions on demand
News
Pricing
Contact
Log in
Get started
Integrations
Securely connect intelligent content
across 1,500+ apps and AI agents
View top integrations
Start building
Leading organizations power business with Box
Connect your agents to Box
Give your agents the context they need to do be most helpful. The Box MCP server connects tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot to your content in Box, enabling secure enterprise search, multi-document analysis, and data extraction across your files.
Learn about Box MCP
One secure content platform for productivity and AI
Easily work with all your files and AI tools wherever your team creates, accesses, or edits content — from Microsoft to Google, Adobe to Salesforce. Box acts as a single secure layer that boosts productivity with seamless, intelligent end-to-end connection.
View integrations
Power intelligent workflows across your AI stack
Natively integrate with apps like
Salesforce
,
Workday
,
Slack
, and
Oracle NetSuite
to give people access to the right information at the right time — with the right user experience. Eliminate manual work by integrating and automating internal and external file sharing, document generation, e-signature and data extraction across the apps you use to drive real value.
Icon Play Blue 20x20
See integrations in action
Keep content secure and compliant across every app
Utilize AI and protect your content as it moves across your tech stack, without compromising the flow of your work. Our seamless integrations with security tools like Okta, Broadcom, Splunk, and Palo Alto Networks let you add multiple layers of defense — now with FedRAMP High, HIPAA, and more.
Learn about Box Security
Access built-in intelligent tools directly in Box
With secure, intelligent tools built in, Box helps teams harness the power of AI while maintaining peace of mind. From GenAI image editing using Adobe Express for Box, to co-authoring with help from Microsoft 365 Copilot, to Box AI for Slack, our platform empowers you to turn content into business value.
See Box Partners
How integrations work to power
Intelligent Content Management
Connected any way you stack it
Build a powerful best-of-breed cloud stack with a single content layer. Box integrations let you connect and manage all your content, no matter where it’s created, shared, or accessed.
All your content, where you work
Our seamless app integrations help you keep content front and center no matter where your teams live. Eliminate version issues, and provide a unified experience.
Always seamless, always secure
Protect the flow of information across every app. All your content adheres to the same enterprise-grade security, privacy, and compliance policies that you set and manage.
NOW AVAILABLE
Enterprise Advanced
Intelligent content workflows and secure document management
Learn more
Contact us
Multi-step task execution with extended context limits
Tackle complex RFPs and create ready-to-share board reports with Box Agent in Pro Mode
Create custom AI agents for specific business needs
Connected forms for business processes
Automated document generation*
AI-powered metadata extraction*
Higher API allowances
Large file uploads up to 500GB
Compliant long-term data preservation
Agentic workflows
All Enterprise Plus capabilities included

hits.title: Slack’s new WYSIWYG input box is terrible
Amazon refused to refund $7k after shipping an empty box instead of a Sony A1
Why can’t a bot tick the 'I'm not a robot' box?
Chosen: A javascript plug-in that makes long select boxes user-friendly.
Dyson air purifier outperformed by cheap DIY box fan filter in Marketplace test
Netflix Stole My VHS Cassette Photos for Its Stranger Things Boxed Set
So you think you know box shadows?

analysis.name: Box
analysis.tagline: Secure, AI-Powered Content Management, Workflow & Collaboration
analysis.value_proposition: Enterprise content management platform combining secure file storage, AI-powered insights, workflow automation, and e-signatures in one compliant platform.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises and regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, government, life sciences) needing secure cloud content management with AI, compliance, and deep app integrations.

features.name: file storage
features.description: Cloud-based file storage and management with folder hierarchy

features.name: folder management
features.description: Organize content in nested folder structures

features.name: file uploads
features.description: Upload files to Box cloud storage

features.name: file downloads
features.description: Download files from Box cloud storage

features.name: large file uploads
features.description: Upload files up to 500GB in size

features.name: collaboration
features.description: Multi-user real-time file collaboration and co-editing with external and internal teams
features.evidence_quote: Access, share, edit, and co-create content with AI while accelerating productivity.

features.name: shared links
features.description: Create shareable links to files and folders for internal and external access

features.name: comments
features.description: In-file commenting and annotation

features.name: tasks
features.description: Task assignment and tracking on files

features.name: collections
features.description: Organize files into custom collections

features.name: file requests
features.description: Request files from external users via secure upload links

features.name: trash
features.description: File recovery from trash with retention period

features.name: web links
features.description: Store and manage web links as content objects within Box

features.name: box archive
features.description: Long-term compliant archival of content

features.name: box notes
features.description: Collaborative note-taking and rich text documents within Box

features.name: box hubs
features.description: AI-powered content portals for organizing and sharing curated content sets

features.name: box ai
features.description: AI-powered summaries, deep analysis, and smart recommendations from content using OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models
features.evidence_quote: Box AI lets you seamlessly tap into leading AI models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google for real-time summaries

features.name: box ai agents
features.description: Intelligent agents that transform work by automating tasks and executing multi-step workflows
features.evidence_quote: Box AI Agents: Intelligent agents to transform work

features.name: box agent pro mode
features.description: Extended context limits for complex multi-step AI task execution like RFPs and board reports
features.evidence_quote: Multi-step task execution with extended context limits. Tackle complex RFPs and create ready-to-share board reports

features.name: custom ai agents
features.description: Create custom AI agents tailored to specific business needs via Box AI Studio
features.evidence_quote: Create custom AI agents for specific business needs

features.name: box ai studio
features.description: Developer tool to build, customize, and configure AI agents and workflows
features.evidence_quote: customize agents to streamline workflows with Box AI Studio

features.name: box extract
features.description: Extract structured data at scale from documents like contracts, bank statements, and handwritten bills of lading
features.evidence_quote: Identify and retrieve structured data from your content — from detailed contracts to bank statements

features.name: ai-powered metadata extraction
features.description: Automatically extract and tag key-value metadata from content using AI

features.name: metadata
features.description: Apply and manage structured key-value metadata on files and folders

features.name: search
features.description: Full-text and metadata search across all content in Box

features.name: e-signature
features.description: Send, track, and manage e-signatures with unlimited signing built into the content platform
features.evidence_quote: get unlimited e-signatures for free to streamline work without added costs

features.name: box sign embedded
features.description: Embed e-signature capabilities directly into third-party apps via API

features.name: sign templates
features.description: Create reusable e-signature templates for common document workflows
features.evidence_quote: Create Sign Request with Sign Template

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: AI-driven no-code workflow automation with drag-and-drop builder
features.evidence_quote: Effortlessly design and deploy complex workflows with an intuitive drag-and-drop builder

features.name: box automate
features.description: Agentic workflow platform uniting AI agents, no-code tools, and enterprise security for complex business processes
features.evidence_quote: Box Automate is here: Put content and AI to work. Power every business workflow.

features.name: box relay
features.description: Workflow automation engine for routing, approvals, and content-driven business processes

features.name: agentic workflows
features.description: End-to-end multi-agent business process automation for complex use cases like loan processing and onboarding

features.name: connected forms
features.description: Forms integrated into business workflows for data collection and process triggering

features.name: no-code apps
features.description: Build intelligent apps for any workflow without writing code
features.evidence_quote: No-code Apps: Intelligent Apps for any workflow

features.name: box doc gen
features.description: Generate on-brand documents from templates via API or workflow

features.name: automated document generation
features.description: Automate generation of documents at scale as part of workflows

features.name: security & compliance
features.description: Built-in compliance tools for GDPR, HIPAA, FINRA, FedRAMP High with automated controls
features.evidence_quote: Meet requirements like GDPR, HIPAA, and FINRA with built-in compliance tools.

features.name: malware detection
features.description: Deep learning-based malware detection on uploaded and shared content
features.evidence_quote: Get deep learning-based malware detection and timely alerts about unusual activity

features.name: automated classification
features.description: AI-driven automated content classification and labeling at scale
features.evidence_quote: automated classification and granular access controls that protect your data at scale

features.name: access controls
features.description: Granular, role-based access controls on files and folders
features.evidence_quote: granular access controls that protect your data at scale

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on support for enterprise identity providers

features.name: legal holds
features.description: Apply legal holds to content to prevent deletion or modification during litigation

features.name: retention policies
features.description: Define and enforce data retention policies for compliance and governance

features.name: long-term data preservation
features.description: Compliant long-term preservation of records and archives

features.name: events api
features.description: Real-time event streaming and audit log API for monitoring content activity

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Configure webhooks for event-driven integrations and automation triggers

features.name: content api
features.description: RESTful APIs for programmatic content management, file operations, and platform integrations
features.evidence_quote: Platform Overview: Build with content APIs

features.name: box mcp server
features.description: MCP server enabling AI agents (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot) to search, analyze, and extract from Box content
features.evidence_quote: The Box MCP server connects tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot to your content in Box

features.name: box ui elements
features.description: Pre-built embeddable UI components for integrating Box into custom applications
features.evidence_quote: UI Elements: Prebuilt rich UI components

features.name: box sdks
features.description: Official SDKs for multiple languages to accelerate Box Platform development
features.evidence_quote: Box SDKs and tools: Speed up development with Box SDKs and developer tools.

features.name: box cli
features.description: Command-line tool for scripting and automating Box API operations
features.evidence_quote: CLI: Command line tool for the Box API

features.name: user management
features.description: Provision, deprovision, and manage managed users and app users at scale
features.evidence_quote: Create Managed User, Create App User, Delete User, Bulk delete external users, Provision Users, Deprovision Users

features.name: representations
features.description: File format conversions and previews (PDF, thumbnails) via API

features.name: developer sandboxes
features.description: Sandbox environments for testing Box Platform integrations before production

features.name: collaborations api
features.description: Programmatically manage collaborations and permission grants on content

features.name: fedramp high compliance
features.description: FedRAMP High authorization for US federal government use cases
features.evidence_quote: seamless integrations with security tools...now with FedRAMP High, HIPAA, and more

features.name: migration services
features.description: Managed migration services for moving content from legacy systems to Box
features.evidence_quote: Migration Services: Seamlessly migrate to the cloud

features.name: box consulting
features.description: Professional consulting services for Box transformation and implementation

features.name: higher api allowances
features.description: Elevated API rate limits and call quotas for high-volume enterprise usage

features.name: genai image editing
features.description: AI-powered image editing via Adobe Express integration directly within Box
features.evidence_quote: GenAI image editing using Adobe Express for Box

differentiators: Named Leader in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management
1,500+ app integrations as a single secure content layer
FedRAMP High authorization for federal government
Native MCP server connecting AI agents (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot) to enterprise content
AI model choice: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models accessible from one platform
Agentic workflows combining no-code tools, AI agents, and enterprise security
Deep learning-based malware detection on content
Box Extract for structured data extraction from unstructured documents at scale

free_tier.limits: Developer free tier available; unlimited e-signatures included on all plans

tiers.name: Enterprise Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Base enterprise tier; all capabilities included in Enterprise Advanced minus advanced agent/agentic features

tiers.name: Enterprise Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: Box Agent Pro Mode, custom AI agents, connected forms, doc gen, metadata extraction, 500GB uploads, agentic workflows

pricing.notes: Pricing page was blocked by Cloudflare bot protection — no tier prices captured. Enterprise Advanced tier is newly launched. Developer platform has separate add-on pricing. Unlimited e-signatures explicitly marketed as free on all plans. Doc gen and AI metadata extraction marked with asterisk (*) on Enterprise Advanced suggesting possible add-on cost.
